title: thlaspi alpestre subsp. occitanicum
intro: Thlaspi alpestre subsp. occitanicum, also known as mountain cress or Occitan mountain cress, is a subspecies of the Thlaspi alpestre plant, a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Thlaspi alpestre subsp. occitanicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Thlaspi alpestre subsp. occitanicum can be consumed as a fresh herb, added to salads or used as a garnish, or prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties.
